seed_problem: Themed grid network; remove at most k links to maximize the increase in s-t shortest path; checker verifies budget + connectivity and scores achieved delay.
mutation: composite: replace the count budget (at most k links) with a KNAPSACK budget (each corridor has a clearing cost c_i, total cleared cost must stay within budget C), and skin as a wildlife-corridor interdiction. This embeds a knapsack-flavoured selection on top of shortest-path interdiction, keeping the optimum NP-hard while making cost-benefit greedy and best-improvement local search diverge.
title: Severing the Wildlife Corridor: Budget-Constrained Habitat Interdiction
strategies: do-nothing baseline: clear no corridors (herd keeps the original route length)
cost-benefit greedy: repeatedly clear the affordable corridor on the current shortest route with the best length-per-clearing-cost ratio while keeping den-watering connectivity

best-improvement local search: at each step tentatively clear every affordable corridor on the current shortest route, recompute the true resulting shortest route, and commit the clearing that maximizes it
randomized multi-restart / Lagrangian relaxation: perturb the cost-benefit ordering across restarts and keep the interdiction set with the largest final detour
